CustomObject.description: Internal test-only stand-in. Carries the camelCase field shape the GenAI Audit DMOs use (userId__c, gatewayRequestId__c, etc.) so AiInsightsTestUtil can fabricate a non-null SObject with `r.get('userId__c')` semantics in package-validation scratch orgs where Data Cloud DMOs aren't provisioned. NOT for customer use; the FluentMetric_AI_User permission set deliberately omits this object.
CustomObject.label: FM Test DMO Row
